content: Caravan Guard: Hey Doc, how's business treatin' ya tonight? I haven't seen you in a couple days, what's the destination this time? Doc Weathers: Ah, the wandering life of a doctor eh? Well, tonight we're heading to Finch farm, my old friend there could use a little medical attention. Caravan Guard: Oh? Something serious? Doc Weathers: Nothing that won't keep with a few bandages and some painkillers, just an old injury that's bothering him. But I won't turn down a little bit of business on the side, you never know what kind of ails your neighbors might have. You hear any rumors around these parts, anything interesting I should know about? Caravan Guard: Not much these days, just the usual runaways and mutated wildlife. Though I did hear about some folks down in the Slog that could use some medicine. I wouldn't be surprised if they had some pretty unpleasant afflictions. Doc Weathers: The Slog? Oh, well now. That's an... Interesting place.

Caravan Guard: Yeah, I heard they've got some real... Characters down there. Maybe we'll swing by on our way back. Doc Weathers: Hmm, I suppose a little detour wouldn't hurt. But first things first, we've got a patient to attend to. I'll see you around, Guard. Caravan Guard: See you later, Doc. Keep your wits about you out there. You never know what you'll run into in this old world. Doc Weathers: Always do, my friend. Always do.
